/X PUBLIC DEFENDER MICHELLE TONG IS THE ATTORNEY OF RECORD/X BASED ON THEDEFENDANT'S NON-COMPLETION OF THE PROGRAM, THE COURT FINDS THAT THERE HAS BEEN A VIOLATION OF PROBATION AND IMPOSES THE ESS/AJW/CH1:SP 2 Y:M/X:DEFENDANT TO RECEIVE CREDIT FOR TIME SERVED 366 DAYS COUNTY JAIL,   366 SAGE FORA TOTAL OF 732 DAYS,/DNACOMP/VF5:200/PROBFINE1/PAR/CTORD:SENTENCE IS DEEMED SERVED PURSUANT TO PC 1170(A)(3)/PAR11/PAROLE70/PAROLE UNIT2/PARDATE:08-23-11/PAR70/

/CAL:SUPPLEMENTAL REPORT ON DA MTR/CONT/CONTD SUPP RPT ON DA MTR/DA-MTR/SUPP:07-01-11/S23/X:COURT REQUESTS AMENDED PROBATION REPORT INCLUDING UPDATED CREDIT TIME,/CTORD:APD TO FORWARD REPORT TO RESPECTIVE DEPARTMENT/

/AJW/CH1 SP 2 Y  M ESS PROB 5 Y PJ 1 Y/STATES/X THE DEFENDANT WAIVES 181AYS OF COUNTY JAIL CREDITS FOR PURPOSES OF THIS PLEA, IF PROBATION IS REVOKED AND THEERE IS A STATE PRISON COMMITMENT, THOSE CREDITS WILL BE REINSTATED/X:1 YEAR COUNTY JAIL SENTENCE MUST BE SERVED IN BAY AREA RESCUE MISSION,A14 MONTH LIVE-IN TREATMENT PROGRAM,/X:FAILURE TO COMPLETE THE PROGRAM MAY RESULT IN A LOSS OF CREDIT FOR TIME SPENT IN THE PROGRAM AND A VIOLATIONOF PROBATION,/X:DEFENDANT'S RELEASE WILL BE ARRANGED THROUGH THE SHERIFF'SALTERNATIVE PROGRAM DIVISION,/DNACOMP/WS/VF4:200/PC/PSR/BKFEE/PROBFINE/SECFEE/ICNA/ /COLLECT/OBEY/ACCEP/
